'''gajushu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:zamboni|zamboni]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-j-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zamboni|zamboni]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| gajushu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:gæjishith|gæjishith]] || [[word:gæjishij|gæjishij]] || [[word:gæjishish|gæjishish]] || [[word:gæjishi|gæjishi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:gajujushuth|gajujushuth]] || [[word:gajujushuj|gajujushuj]] || [[word:gajujushush|gajujushush]] || [[word:gajujushu|gajujushu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:gajushuth|gajushuth]] || [[word:gajushuj|gajushuj]] || [[word:gajushush|gajushush]] || [[word:gajushu|gajushu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:gajufshuth|gajufshuth]] || [[word:gajufshuj|gajufshuj]] || [[word:gajufshush|gajufshush]] || [[word:gajufshuf|gajufshuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:gajushuthu|gajushuthu]] || [[word:gajushuju|gajushuju]] || [[word:gajushushu|gajushushu]] || [[word:gajushuku|gajushuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:gajushuth|gajushuth]] || [[word:gajushuj|gajushuj]] || [[word:gajushush|gajushush]] || [[word:gajushu|gajushu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:gajushuthul|gajushuthul]] || [[word:gajushujul|gajushujul]] || [[word:gajushushul|gajushushul]] || [[word:gajushukul|gajushukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:gajushuthuthu|gajushuthuthu]] || [[word:gajushujuju|gajushujuju]] || [[word:gajushushushu|gajushushushu]] || [[word:gajushuku|gajushuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:gajushuthun|gajushuthun]] || [[word:gajushujun|gajushujun]] || [[word:gajushushun|gajushushun]] || [[word:gajushukun|gajushukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:gajushuthuoro|gajushuthuoro]] || [[word:gajushujuoro|gajushujuoro]] || [[word:gajushushuoro|gajushushuoro]] || [[word:gajushukuoro|gajushukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|1f1e26d}}
